utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Great ! All right , so I will call you later .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Hey ... Hey ... Hey ! Who was that ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: That would be Casey . We are going out tonight .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: going out , huh ? Wow ! Wow ! So things did not work out with Kathy , huh ? Bummer .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No , things are fine with Kathy . I am having a late dinner with her tonight , right after my early dinner with Casey .

emotion_cause.span: 7_things are fine with Kathy . I am having a late dinner with her tonight , right after my early dinner with Casey .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah ... yeah . And the craziest thing is that I just ate a whole pizza by myself !

emotion_cause.span: 9_the craziest thing is that I just ate a whole pizza by myself !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Wait ! You are going out with Kathy !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah . Why are you getting so upset ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , I am upset ... for you . I mean , having sex with an endless line of beautiful women must be very unfulfilling for you .

emotion_cause.span: 12_having sex with an endless line of beautiful women must be very unfulfilling for you .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: What is the big deal ? It is not like we are exclusive .

emotion_cause.span: 12_having sex with an endless line of beautiful women must be very unfulfilling for you .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Look , Joey , Kathy is clearly not fulfilling your emotional needs .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: But Casey , I mean granted I only saw the back of her head , but I got this sense that she is ... she is smart , and funny , and gets you .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You got all that from the back of her head ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: All right look , I think it is time for you to settle down . You know ? Make a choice , pick a lane .
